name: Jetpack Compose
author: google
description: Jetpack Compose is Android’s recommended modern toolkit for building native UI. It simplifies and accelerates UI development on Android. Quickly bring your app to life with less code, powerful tools, and intuitive Kotlin APIs.

name: Android Jetpack
author: google
description: Jetpack is a suite of libraries to help developers follow best practices, reduce boilerplate code, and write code that works consistently across Android versions and devices so that developers can focus on the code they care about.

name: okhttp
author: square
description: An HTTP client for Android, Kotlin, and Java.

name: retrofit
author: square
description: A type-safe HTTP client for Android and the JVM.

name: moshi
author: square
description: A modern JSON library for Kotlin and Java.

name: hilt
author: google
description: A fast dependency injector for Android and Java.

name: xlog
author: elvishew
description: Android logger, pretty, powerful and flexible, log to everywhere, save to file, all you want is here.

name: coil
author: coil-kt
description: Image loading for Android and Compose Multiplatform.

name: lottie
author: airbnb
description: Render After Effects animations natively on Android and iOS, Web, and React Native

name: colorpicker-compose
author: skydoves
description: 🎨 Kotlin Multiplatform color picker library for getting colors from any images by tapping on the desired color.

name: telephoto
author: saket
description: Building blocks for designing media experiences in Compose UI.

name: jsoup
author: jsoup.org
description: jsoup is a Java library that simplifies working with real-world HTML and XML. It offers an easy-to-use API for URL fetching, data parsing, extraction, and manipulation using DOM API methods, CSS, and xpath selectors.

name: compose-rich-editor
author: MohamedRejeb
description: A Rich text editor library for both Jetpack Compose and Compose Multiplatform, fully customizable, supports HTML and Markdown.
